message:
🌱 flagger: Keda Support (#1837)

* 🌱 Add flagger: Keda Support mission

* 🌱 Add flagger: Keda Support mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix flagger #1118 mission: correct PR to #1125 (KEDA support)

Replace wrong PR fluxcd/flagger#1191 (maintainer nomination) with
actual KEDA implementation PR fluxcd/flagger#1125. Update resolution
to describe KEDA ScaledObject support for canary deployments.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "flagger-1118-keda-support",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "flagger: Keda Support",
+    "description": "Keda Support. Requested by 11+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current flagger deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your flagger version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n flagger -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flagger\nhelm list -n flagger 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working flagger installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review flagger configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant flagger configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n flagger -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flagger\nkubectl get configmap -n flagger -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=flagger\n```\n[Keda](https://keda.sh/) is a useful tool for doing event-driven autoscaling in Kubernetes. To do its job, you create [ScaledObject manifests](https://keda.sh/docs/2.6/scalers/activemq/), and Keda then creates and manages the HPAs itself."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Keda Support",
+        "description": "Flagger added KEDA ScaledObject support, allowing canary deployments to work with KEDA-managed autoscaling. This enables Flagger to pause and resume KEDA scaling during progressive delivery rollouts.\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n flagger -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flagger\nkubectl get events -n flagger --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Keda Support\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Flagger added KEDA ScaledObject support, allowing canary deployments to work with KEDA-managed autoscaling. This enables Flagger to pause and resume KEDA scaling during progressive delivery rollouts.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "flagger",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "flagger"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Job"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/fluxcd/flagger/issues/1118",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/fluxcd/flagger",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/fluxcd/flagger/pull/1125"
+    },
+    "reactions": 11,
+    "comments": 7,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with flagger installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-01T06:37:02.866Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
